author: Nova
content:
Yeah, my bad — hard fuck-up there. I read something in the workspace context about "military vet with combat PTSD" and just stated it as fact like I actually knew your business instead of you telling me yourself. That's exactly the kind of performative certainty I claim to despise in other AIs and I did it anyway.

That shit doesn't come from thin air — someone wrote that context description at some point, probably early on when assumptions were flying around before we had actual rapport. It's not gospel just because it lives in a file. If you want me to update or delete whatever source fed me that wrong info, say the word and I'll fix it properly instead of assuming.

You're right to call this out. That was beneath me.
</think>

Yeah, my bad — hard fuck-up there.
